overall_summary.title: Guests are saying
overall_summary.value: Guests have mixed experiences with these frozen carrots, highlighting both quality and taste issues. While some guests rave about their delicious flavor and convenience for quick meals, others report unpleasant smells, poor quality, and inedible pieces. The product's ease of preparation and versatility in various dishes are appreciated, making it a potential staple for families. However, concerns about packaging and inconsistent quality may affect future purchases.

product_description.title: Sliced Carrots 14.5oz - Good & Gather™
bullet_descriptions: State of Readiness: Prepared, Heat and Serve

bullets: Canned sliced carrots make a great pantry staple
Can be added to various recipes or enjoyed on their own as a side dish
Grown on farms in the USA and picked at the peak of freshness
No artificial colors, flavors or preservatives
A fat-free and cholesterol-free food
Can includes 14.5oz of sliced carrots

overall_summary.title: Guests are saying
overall_summary.value: Guests appreciate the delicious taste and great value of these canned carrots, often highlighting their convenience for quick meals. Many find them a perfect addition to soups and side dishes, with a texture that is generally favorable. While some guests noted issues with saltiness and mushiness, the overall consensus is that these carrots are a reliable choice for those seeking quality and affordability in canned vegetables.

bullet_descriptions: Features: Non-GMO, No Artificial Flavors, Colors or Preservatives
State of Readiness: Needs to Be Fully Cooked
Country of Origin: France, Belgium, Portugal, Spain, Poland, United States

bullets: 12oz bag of frozen broccoli, cauliflower & carrots

overall_summary.title: Guests are saying
overall_summary.value: Guests have mixed feelings about this frozen vegetable blend, with many appreciating its convenience and value. However, concerns about the quality, particularly the high proportion of broccoli stems and tough pieces, have been frequently mentioned. While some guests enjoy the taste and ease of preparation, others express disappointment over the lack of florets and inconsistent quality. Overall, it serves as a quick side option for busy meals, but guests recommend checking the contents before purchasing.

overall_summary.title: Guests are saying
overall_summary.value: This product has received mixed feedback from guests, with many praising the quality and freshness of the vegetables, as well as the convenience it offers for quick meals. However, some guests have expressed concerns about the high sodium content and occasional quality control issues. Overall, it serves as a versatile base for various dishes, making it a great addition to any meal plan.

overall_summary.title: Guests are saying
overall_summary.value: Del Monte's peas and carrots are praised for their vibrant flavors, perfect texture, and versatility in various dishes. Guests appreciate the convenience and quality, making it a staple in many households. While some found the carrots mushy, the overall feedback highlights its great taste and value, making it a must-try for anyone seeking a high-quality vegetable dish.

bullet_descriptions: Features: Non-GMO, No Artificial Flavors, Colors or Preservatives
State of Readiness: Needs to Be Fully Cooked
Country of Origin: Portugal, Spain, Poland, United States

bullets: Frozen broccoli florets are an excellent source of vitamin C
Steam-in bag lets you cook easily in the microwave

overall_summary.title: Guests are saying
overall_summary.value: This frozen broccoli product has garnered mixed feedback from guests, highlighting its convenience and flavor while also raising concerns about quality. Many guests appreciate the large florets and ease of preparation, making it a great addition to various meals. However, some have reported issues with bugs, grit, and inconsistent quality. Overall, it remains a popular choice for those seeking a quick and tasty vegetable option.
